summary_raw: NVDA holds ~81% AI chip market share. AMD launching Instinct MI450 (CDNA5, 2nm TSMC) and Helios rack-scale platform. Intel gaining in AI inference via Xeon/Gaudi but far behind in training. Google's TPUs (Alphabet) emerging as key threat after Anthropic committed to 1M TPUs. Custom silicon from hyperscalers is biggest emerging risk, not AMD/Intel.
